mapper.select: select max(logtime) as time from DP_OPERATE_LOG where logname = #{logname}

select l.ID as id,l.LOGNAME as logName,l.LOGTIME as logTime,l.DATACOUNT as dataCount from DP_OPERATE_LOG l where l.logtime = (select max(logtime) as time from DP_OPERATE_LOG where logname = #{logname}) and logname = #{logname}

select l.ID as id,l.LOGNAME as logName,l.LOGTIME as logTime,l.DATACOUNT as dataCount from DP_OPERATE_LOG l where l.logtime = (select min(logtime) as time from DP_OPERATE_LOG where logname = #{logname}) and logname = #{logname}
select l.ID,l.LOGNAME,l.LOGTIME,l.DATACOUNT from DP_OPERATE_LOG l where logname = #{logname}
mapper.update: update DP_OPERATE_LOG l set l.logtime=#{logTime},l.datacount = #{dataCount} where l.id = #{id}
